mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate,
acc.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(acc.description, 4000, 1) AS description, -- CLOB 컬럼을 JSP에서 사용 가능한 길이로 잘라서 조회 acc.phone, acc.category, acc.status, acc.price, acc.areacode,
COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p2 JOIN accommodation acc2 ON p2.place_id = acc2.accommodation_id WHERE p2.place_type = 'ACC' AND acc2.status = 'OPEN'
AND p2.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND p2.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY ) < 10 THEN INTERVAL '60' DAY ELSE INTERVAL '30' DAY END THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, -- 최근 등록된 맛집 수가 적으면 60일, 충분하면 30일 기준으로 최신 맛집을 우선 노출 NVL(p.view_count, 0) DESC, -- 최신 조건이 같으면 조회수 높은 순 p.place_id DESC -- 마지막 동점 정렬 기준 ) AS rn
FROM place p JOIN accommodation acc ON p.place_id = acc.accommodation_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_type = 'ACC' AND acc.status = 'OPEN' -- 영업 중인 맛집만 랭킹 대상
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, acc.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(acc.description, 4000, 1), acc.phone, acc.category, acc.status, acc.price, acc.areacode ) WHERE rn > #{start} AND rn <= #{end} -- start 초과 ~ end 이하 구간만 조회
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{value} AND r.status = 'DISPLAY'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p JOIN accommodation acc ON p.place_id = acc.accommodation_id WHERE p.place_type = 'ACC' AND acc.status = 'OPEN'
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate,
acc.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(acc.description, 4000, 1) AS description, acc.phone, acc.category, acc.status, acc.price, acc.areacode,
COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p2 JOIN accommodation acc2 ON p2.place_id = acc2.accommodation_id WHERE p2.place_type = 'ACC' AND acc2.status = 'OPEN'
AND p2.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND p2.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY ) < 10 THEN INTERVAL '60' DAY ELSE INTERVAL '30' DAY END THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, NVL(p.view_count, 0) DESC, p.place_id DESC ) AS rn
FROM place p JOIN accommodation acc ON p.place_id = acc.accommodation_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_type = 'ACC' AND acc.status = 'OPEN'
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, acc.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(acc.description, 4000, 1), acc.phone, acc.category, acc.status, acc.price, acc.areacode ) WHERE rn <= 5
